rules.description: Every workflow overlay unit must declare source_of_truth_root and at least one source_of_truth_ref under control/.
Unresolved workflow, profile, snippet, or authority refs are fatal.
Overlay artifacts may select, annotate, and order prompt assets, but may not redefine legality, gating, or promotion semantics.
All workflow ids referenced by retrieval indexes or profiles must be listed in prompt-registry/manifest.json units.
Moved, renamed, or deleted control authority refs fail validation until the overlay is updated.
